allowedActiveChanges.name: attack-phase-intent-composer
allowedActiveChanges.reason: Wave 2 (council 2026-07-02): intent-first attack declaration per ADR 0002 (Proposed). Implementation tasks are gated on task phase 0 — ADR 0002 open-question ratification (OQ1-OQ5) with the user. Spec deltas authored; openspec validate --strict passes.
